Off Calendar Jun-11-2024 Continued To Jul-02-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-06-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated December 05, 1991, is admitted to probate. Norman O. Doyle and Kathleen Clifford are appointed as the Co-Executors of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00 Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 11, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Amy Harrington is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Brown. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-17-2023 Continued To Jun-06-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
